---
title: "Pigmentation Gene Network"
---

A reconstructed, gene-resolved network of published pigmentation
genotype‚Üíphenotype findings, with a curated validation-case set.

## Contents

- **[1 ¬∑ Reconstruct network](notebooks/01_reconstruct_published_network.ipynb)** ‚Äî
  assemble the published network (nodes and signed, sourced edges).
- **[2 ¬∑ Resolve to genes](notebooks/02_resolve_network_to_genes.ipynb)** ‚Äî
  resolve network entities to canonical genes.
- **[3 ¬∑ Case provenance](docs/NB3_case_assembly_provenance.md)** ‚Äî
  acquisition and extraction record for the validation cases.

::: {.callout-note}
This site is built from the committed notebooks by GitHub Actions and served on
GitHub Pages. Pages show results computed on the author's machine; notebooks are
not re-executed at build time.
:::
